steps: Go to https://cloud.meilisearch.com/ and sign up or log in
Create a new project by clicking 'New project', choosing a name and region
Wait for the project to be provisioned (usually a few seconds)
Click on your project to open its dashboard
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
You will see auto-generated keys: 'Default Admin API Key' (full access) and 'Default Search API Key' (search-only)
Copy the 'Default Admin API Key' for server-side operations
Copy the 'Default Search API Key' for client-side/frontend search queries
Also note your project's 'Host URL' — this is the base URL for all API calls

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Meilisearch API key. Use the Admin API key for full access or the Search API key for read-only search operations.

notes: Meilisearch is self-hosted open source or available as Meilisearch Cloud at cloud.meilisearch.com
For self-hosted instances: set a master key at startup with MEILI_MASTER_KEY env variable; the instance auto-generates default Admin and Search keys
Never use the master key in application code — use the generated Admin or Search API keys
The Admin API key has full access; the Search API key is read-only and safe for frontend use
Meilisearch Cloud free tier is available for small projects
The base URL for cloud projects is project-specific (e.g., https://xxx.meilisearch.io)

test_endpoint.description: Check instance health — returns {status: 'available'} when the instance is running correctly
